'''gazazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylarium|xylarium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylarium|xylarium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gazazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzæzhæth|gæzæzhæth]] || [[word:gæzæzhæj|gæzæzhæj]] || [[word:gæzæzhæsh|gæzæzhæsh]] || [[word:gæzæzhæ|gæzæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazazazhath|gazazazhath]] || [[word:gazazazhaj|gazazazhaj]] || [[word:gazazazhash|gazazazhash]] || [[word:gazazazha|gazazazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazazhath|gazazhath]] || [[word:gazazhaj|gazazhaj]] || [[word:gazazhash|gazazhash]] || [[word:gazazha|gazazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazafzhath|gazafzhath]] || [[word:gazafzhaj|gazafzhaj]] || [[word:gazafzhash|gazafzhash]] || [[word:gazafzhaf|gazafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazazhatha|gazazhatha]] || [[word:gazazhaja|gazazhaja]] || [[word:gazazhasha|gazazhasha]] || [[word:gazazhaka|gazazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazazhath|gazazhath]] || [[word:gazazhaj|gazazhaj]] || [[word:gazazhash|gazazhash]] || [[word:gazazha|gazazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazazhathal|gazazhathal]] || [[word:gazazhajal|gazazhajal]] || [[word:gazazhashal|gazazhashal]] || [[word:gazazhakal|gazazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazazhathatha|gazazhathatha]] || [[word:gazazhajaja|gazazhajaja]] || [[word:gazazhashasha|gazazhashasha]] || [[word:gazazhaka|gazazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazazhathan|gazazhathan]] || [[word:gazazhajan|gazazhajan]] || [[word:gazazhashan|gazazhashan]] || [[word:gazazhakan|gazazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazazhathaoro|gazazhathaoro]] || [[word:gazazhajaoro|gazazhajaoro]] || [[word:gazazhashaoro|gazazhashaoro]] || [[word:gazazhakaoro|gazazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
